title: The Bombay Revenue Jurisdiction Act, 1876
full_text: The Bombay Revenue Jurisdiction Act, 1876 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 187610 Act Number: 10 Enactment Date: 1876-03-28 Act Year: 1876 Short Title: The Bombay Revenue Jurisdiction Act, 1876 Long Title: An Act to limit the jurisdiction of the Civil Courts throughout the Bombay Presidency in matters relating to the Land-revenue, and for other purposes. Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice Department: Legislative Department Enforcement Date: 28-03-1876 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2. THE SECOND SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Bombay Revenue Jurisdiction Act, 1876 Show all section Section 1. Short title. Section 2. Repealed. Section 3. Interpretation-clause. Section 4. Bar of certain suits. Section 5. Saving of certain suits. Section 6. Bar of certain suits against Revenue officers. Section 7. Punishment or prosecution of Revenue officers not a bar to civil remedies. Section 8. Repealed. Section 9. Repealed. Section 10. Repealed. Section 11. Suits not to be entertained unless plaintiff has exhausted right of appeal. Section 12. Power of State Government to refer questions for decision of High Court. Section 13. Power of Civil Judge to refer questions of jurisdiction to High Court. Section 14. Composition of Bench. Section 15. [Repealed.]. Section 16. Privileges of Government in suits in which it is concerned. Section 17. Repealed. Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2. THE SECOND SCHEDULE.
